comment.body:
Bare with me since I'm not English speaking. 
But when Alma say (for example) the risk is March opex. 
Do you interpret that is that March opex may start a bigger decline?
Or do you interpret that as the decline has already begun and into March opex we may be at a critical support, and the risk is that the support may not hold?

comment.body:
Yes, I know about the window. But I just wonder what she means with the risk. 
Does she see risk that we will start fall out of this rangebound. Or is the risk that we have already fallen out of it and it may decline much bigger - hence a risk. 

In my world a 5% decline isn't a risk. But if we would go beyond let say 6500 that may be a risk

comment.body: Marcus. For me anyways technical looking at monthly mopex to mopex  regressions It feels a bit like dec24-mar25 months. Possibly even nov21-june 2022 months...  Not saying we get a tarrif news like bomb in last April.  But sequential relatively flat slopes tend to lead to a 5-10 sink.  Quarter slight downsloping at the moment too.   Will see what she adds in the coming weeks
